name: Arturia Pigments
source_section: Chapter 3.7 — MIDI (Pigments has no fixed NRPN table; all CCs except reserved ones are user-assignable via MIDI Learn per preset)
notes: Pigments does NOT have a fixed MIDI implementation chart. Parameter-to-CC assignments are made per-preset via MIDI Learn (right-click any knob → MIDI Learn → move controller).
The only fixed MIDI messages are the reserved ones listed below.
All CC numbers not listed as reserved (2–10, 12–63, 65–122) can be assigned to any parameter.
Macros M1–M4 are the primary performance controls and should be the first thing mapped per patch.
CC assignments are saved at the PRESET level — each preset has its own map.
MPE is supported: per-note pitch bend, pressure (CC 74 by default for slide), and slide.

pitch_bend.description: Pitch bend — hardcoded, range configurable in Settings

aftertouch.description: Channel Aftertouch — hardcoded, assignable as mod source internally

cc_01.name: Modulation Wheel
cc_01.description: Hardcoded modulation wheel input. Assignable as a mod source internally.

cc_07.name: Master Volume
cc_07.description: Controls Master Volume knob (+6 to -70 dB). Hardcoded default, always active.

cc_11.name: Expression Controller
cc_11.description: Expression — hardcoded, assignable as mod source internally.

cc_74_mpe.name: MPE Slide (default)
cc_74_mpe.description: Default CC for MPE Slide. Configurable in Settings → MPE → Slide CC.
cc_74_mpe.notes: Only active when MPE mode is enabled.

recommended_iron_static_assignments.description: Recommended CC map for Digitakt-driven MIDI control of Pigments in the IRON STATIC rig. Apply via MIDI Learn in each Pigments preset.

assignments.purpose: Main performance macro — tie to filter sweep or texture shift
Modulation depth macro — LFO amount, FM amount
Primary filter sweep — standard CC74 per GM2 convention
Second filter sweep for dual-filter patches

filters.name: F2 FM Amount
filters.notes: FM amount modulation — expressive target for Macro assignment

filters.name: Filter Blend
filters.notes: Blends between F1 and F2 output

mpe_support.notes: MPE mode is toggled in Settings. When enabled, Macro 1 label may show 'Mpe'.

steps: 1. Right-click (or Ctrl+click) any knob or slider in Pigments.
3. Move the physical controller or send the CC from the Digitakt.
4. The CC is now bound to that parameter for this preset.
5. Save the preset to persist the assignment.
how_to_assign_cc.remove_assignment: Right-click the red-outlined control → Remove MIDI Assignment.
how_to_assign_cc.view_all_assignments: Open the MIDI tab in the side panel (gear icon). The list shows all current CC assignments for the loaded preset.
how_to_assign_cc.templates: Use the MIDI Controller Menu in the MIDI tab to load a template for Arturia controllers (KeyLab, etc.) or Generic.
